articles.title: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble as crucial shipping lane threatened
articles.summary: Iranian official threatens to "set fire" to any ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Six US soldiers killed in Iranian strike on Kuwait base
articles.summary: The US defence secretary confirms a US military base was hit by an Iranian missile on Sunday.

articles.title: 'They hit so hard the house was shaking': Iranians describe impact of US-Israel attacks
articles.summary: People in Iran tell the BBC they hear explosions day and night, as the US and Israel continue striking the country for a third day.

articles.title: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies
articles.summary: Emmanuel Macron said eight countries could enjoy protection from France's nuclear umbrella - but that Paris would retain sole decision-making power.

articles.title: At least 169 people killed in South Sudan 'surprise' attack
articles.summary: Peacekeepers are sheltering about 1,000 civilians near their base and providing emergency care.

articles.title: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
articles.summary: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.

articles.title: India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal
articles.summary: A host of deals, including one to supply India with uranium, is unveiled as Mark Carney meets Narendra Modi in Delhi.

articles.title: Lost Rembrandt painting rediscovered after 65 years
articles.summary: The painting, created by the Dutch master in 1633, had disappeared after being sold in 1961.

articles.title: Saturday Night Live criticised for 'hurtful' Tourette's sketch
articles.summary: The condition is "not a joke", the Tourette Action charity says, as the Baftas fallout continues.

articles.title: Texas authorities identify Austin bar shooting victims
articles.summary: Three victims and the suspected gunman were killed, and more were injured in the Sunday shooting that the FBI says could have terrorism links.
